CustomField.formula: Forecast_Sales_in_January__c + Forecast_Sales_in_February__c + Forecast_Sales_in_March__c + Forecast_Sales_in_April__c + Forecast_Sales_in_May__c + Forecast_Sales_in_June__c + Forecast_Sales_in_July__c + Forecast_Sales_in_August__c + Forecast_Sales_in_September__c + Forecast_Sales_in_October__c + Forecast_Sales_in_November__c + Forecast_Sales_in_December__c
CustomField.label: Total Estimated Sales Volume
